metadata.title: Waypoint
metadata.description: Easily generate dynamic content maps in your folder notes using waypoints. Enables folders to show up in the graph view and removes the need for messy tags!

regex.target: .log("在文件夹笔记中发现了“+e+”标记！")
.log("在无效的笔记中发现了"+e+"标记。")

regex.source: .error("Error: No "+i+" flag found while trying to print error.")
regex.target: .error("在尝试打印错误时未找到“+i+”标志。")

regex.source: .error("Error: Waypoint bounds not found, unable to continue.")
regex.target: .error("错误：无法找到航路点边界，无法继续。")

regex.source: .error("Error: No "+e+" found while trying to update "+t.path)
.error("Error: Waypoint flag must be surrounded by double-percent signs.")
regex.target: .error("错误：航路点标记必须用双百分号括起来。")

regex.source: .error("Error: Landmark flag must be surrounded by double-percent signs.")
regex.target: .error("错误：地标标记必须用双百分号括起来。")

regex.source: text:"For instructions on how to use this plugin, check out the README on "
regex.target: text:"有关如何使用此插件的说明，请查看 README 位于"

regex.source: text:" or get in touch with the author "
.setDesc("Select the style of folder note used.")
regex.target: .setDesc("选择所使用的文件夹笔记样式。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, folder notes will be listed alongside other notes in the generated waypoints.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，文件夹笔记将会在生成的路标中与其他笔记一起列出。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, non-Markdown files will be listed alongside other notes in the generated waypoints.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用了，非 Markdown 文件将会在生成的路径点中与其他笔记一起列出。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the name of the folder note containing the waypoint will be listed at the top of the generated waypoints.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，包含航点的文件夹笔记的名称将显示在生成的航点顶部。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the waypoint generator will stop scanning nested folders when it encounters a folder note. Otherwise, it will only stop if the folder note contains a waypoint.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用了路径点生成器，当它遇到一个文件夹笔记时，将停止扫描嵌套文件夹。否则，它只会在文件夹笔记包含路径点时停止。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, links will be generated like [[My Page]] instead of [My Page](../Folder/My%Page.md).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用了，链接将会生成为[[我的页面]]，而不是[我的页面](../Folder/My%Page.md)。")

regex.source: .setDesc('If enabled, links will use the "title" frontmatter property for the displayed text (if it exists).')
regex.target: .setDesc('如果启用，链接将使用“标题” frontmatte 属性作为显示文本（如果存在）。')

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled, the waypoint list will be indented with spaces rather than with tabs.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用，路径点列表将使用空格缩进而不是制表符。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If spaces are used for indentation, this is the number of spaces that will be used per indentation level.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果使用空格缩进，这将是每个缩进级别使用的空格数量。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Text flag that triggers waypoint generation in a folder note. Must be surrounded by double-percent signs.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件夹笔记中触发生成路径点的文本标记。必须用双百分号括起来。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Text flag that triggers landmark generation in a folder note. Must be surrounded by double-percent signs.")
regex.target: .setDesc("在文件夹笔记中触发地标生成的文本标志。必须用双百分号括起来。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Regex list of files or folders to ignore while making indices. Enter only one regex per line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("忽略索引时要忽略的文件或文件夹的正则表达式列表。每行只输入一个正则表达式。")
